template.name: Vehicle
template.parameter: const int id, const int lane, const int mv

query.comment: Checks that the model never reaches a deadlock state. This means the controller and vehicles do not get stuck permanently and at least one valid transition remains possible.
Checks that there exists at least one possible execution where the NORTH vehicle enters the critical zone. This confirms that the controller can grant access to N0 for its route.
Checks that there exists at least one possible execution where the SOUTH vehicle enters the critical zone. This confirms that S1 is not permanently blocked by the controller logic.
Checks that there exists at least one possible execution where the EAST vehicle enters the critical zone. This confirms that the model allows E2 to be scheduled and granted access.
Checks that there exists at least one possible execution where the WEST vehicle enters the critical zone. This confirms that W3 can also receive permission from the controller.

Safety property: checks that no critical zone is occupied by more than one vehicle at the same time. This verifies that the controller prevents conflicting vehicles from entering the same critical zone.
Checks that every assigned vehicle entry delay remains within the latest allowed arrival time.
